details.description: **** SAMPLE DATA **** Step into Elevated Living in the Heart of Springfield, Austin! With 4 bedrooms and 2 baths, this residence has been meticulously redesigned to offer a seamless blend of contemporary charm and timeless elegance. From the moment you step inside, you'll be struck by the sense of sophistication that permeates every corner. Thoughtfully curated updates, including fresh paint, sleek flooring, and stylish countertops, elevate the aesthetic of this home to new heights, creating a space that's both welcoming and effortlessly chic. details.description: **** SAMPLE DATA **** Just bring your clothes!! This vibrant, modern, 3-bedroom, 2.5-bathroom townhome perfectly blends funky and boho design, offering comfort and style in the peaceful Point Venture community. Fully furnished right down to the dishes and thoughtfully designed, the home features unique paint accents throughout, adding personality and charm to every room. The kitchen boasts stunning granite countertops and an electric stainless steel range, perfect for whipping up meals while enjoying the beautiful natural light. All three bedrooms are located on the second floor, ensuring privacy and tranquility. The home backs directly to the second hole of the Point Venture Golf Course, offering serene views and a sense of openness. Plus, with the area’s high deer population and abundant wildlife, you’ll often spot these graceful creatures right in your backyard. Point Venture is known for its quiet, peaceful atmosphere, making it an ideal retreat from the hustle and bustle. Enjoy access to lake activities, including boating and fishing, and a wide array of amenities: a private marina, pool, gym, tennis/pickleball courts, a 50-acre private park, and even a disc golf course. Don’t miss out on dining at the beloved Gnarly Gar restaurant, or relax at the private library. **** SAMPLE DATA ****

details.description: **** SAMPLE DATA **** Open House Saturday and Sunday 12-3pm!  - Welcome to 6303 Bexton, a beautifully remodeled home in the heart of Cherry Creek, offering an unparalleled blend of modern luxury and timeless charm. This 3 bedroom,2 bathroom home has been thoughtfully designed with beautiful finishes, an open-concept layout, and an entertainer’s dream backyard—making it the perfect place to call home. Step inside to a stylish main living area, where sleek concrete faux flat walls create a sophisticated yet cozy ambiance. The centerpiece of the space is a stunning entertainment feature wall, designed for modern living and entertaining. The brand-new luxury vinyl plank flooring adds warmth and durability throughout the home. The black-on-black chef’s kitchen is a true showstopper, featuring quartz countertops, high-end appliances, and sleek cabinetry—blending bold aesthetics with everyday functionality. Whether you’re preparing a gourmet meal or enjoying your morning coffee, this space is as beautiful as it is practical. The primary suite is a serene retreat, complete with a double vanity ensuite and a glass-enclosed walk-in shower. Spacious and filled with natural light, this suite offers the perfect balance of comfort and elegance. One of the rarest features in this pocket of Cherry Creek is the detached ADU, fully heated and cooled, offering endless possibilities as a home office, guest suite, or personal gym. Outside, the massive backyard is a true oasis, featuring a spacious deck, perfect for relaxing, entertaining, or enjoying the fresh Texas air. Large lots like this are hard to come by in Cherry Creek, making this outdoor space a true standout. **** SAMPLE DATA ****

details.description:
**** SAMPLE DATA **** **Prime Land Opportunity in Northeast Denver**

Discover a rare gem in the vibrant corridor of Northeast Denver, where opportunity meets tranquility. This exceptional parcel of land is located at the end of a county road, adjacent to expansive government land, ensuring both privacy and stunning natural surroundings.

Situated amidst the burgeoning Burlington Northern switching yard, with convenient access to UPS and FedEx transfer stations, and just a stone's throw from the prestigious 2000-acre World Class Rodeo Dunes Golf Course, this land offers both connectivity and seclusion.

Embrace the freedom of no covenants, no HOA, and no metro district restrictions. This pristine land offers a serene escape from the hustle and bustle of city life, set against the backdrop of Colorado’s picturesque agricultural landscape. Imagine panoramic views of expansive farmlands and the majestic Colorado mountains right from your doorstep.

Whether you're looking to build your dream home or envisioning a new venture, this land promises endless potential and the perfect setting for country living at its finest. Don’t miss out on this unique opportunity to make your dreams a reality. Explore your future oasis today and experience the best of both worlds – peaceful country living with modern conveniences at your fingertips. **** SAMPLE DATA ****

**** SAMPLE DATA **** Welcome to 4101 W 111th Cir, a beautifully maintained 2-bedroom, 2-bathroom home perfectly situated on a desirable corner lot across from a park. Upon entering, you’re welcomed by a cozy family room featuring a gas fireplace, ideal for relaxing evenings. The kitchen boasts laminate floors, ample counter and cabinet space for all your culinary needs, and flows seamlessly into the dining nook, which opens to the private backyard through sliding glass doors—perfect for indoor-outdoor living. The main level is completed by a convenient powder room and a laundry room with an included washer and dryer. Upstairs, you’ll find two spacious bedrooms with walk-in closets and a full bathroom. This home has been meticulously cared for by its original owner and includes recent upgrades such as a new water heater (2022), a new AC unit (2024), a brand-new electric panel, and a new roof (2024). Additional storage is available in the crawl space. With an attached one-car garage and an unbeatable location offering easy access to both Denver and Boulder, this home could be yours. Don’t miss this opportunity—schedule your showing today! **** SAMPLE DATA ****

details.description: **** SAMPLE DATA **** Just built in 2022, get the look and feel of new construction without the wait! This 4 bedroom, 2 bath home still feels brand new and offers an open floorplan, split bedroom layout, private fenced in backyard and a new custom paver patio with built-in fire pit. As you enter the front door you are greeted with the large kitchen that is open to the dining area and living room and features bright cabinets, granite countertops, a huge island, stainless steel appliances with an upgraded dishwasher and a pantry for storage. The living room is spacious and features sliding glass doors that lead to your paver patio that expands the whole length of the house, creating the perfect area for weekend barbecues, hosting gatherings, and outdoor dining. The primary bedroom with views of the backyard has an ensuite bathroom that features double sinks, large step-in shower, and a massive walk-in closet. On the opposite side of the house is the three additional bedrooms and the guest bathroom. Additional features of this home include an indoor laundry room, fully fenced backyard, and upgraded ethernet drops into most of the rooms for hardwire internet connections - perfect if you work from home, are a gamer, or just appreciate faster internet speeds. This home sits high and dry, not in a flood zone but includes hurricane shutters for peace of mind. Cypress Mill is sought-after for its resort style amenities including a clubhouse with fitness center, a large swimming pool with cabanas, splash pad area, dog park, playground, basketball and pickleball courts as well as scenic walking trails. This community is centrally located to all the major highways, shopping centers, schools, golf courses, beaches, entertainment and more! If you have been searching for that perfect balance between comfort, functionality and a sense of community all while being only minutes away from all the area has to offer, then I invite you to come explore this like-new home today! **** SAMPLE DATA ****
